title: Project title
subtitle: Optional one-line project descriptor
description: Explain what the project is, who it serves, and the value it creates in one clear sentence.
metaDescription: A project case study by Fiza Mansoor.

hero.placeholderHint: Add your image path as the src value in project.json
hero.alt: Placeholder for the main project image
hero.caption: Describe what the image shows and why it matters.

blocks.title: Overview
blocks.intro: Give the reader the essential context and explain why the project mattered.

blocks.title: My contribution
blocks.content: State what you owned, what you collaborated on, and the decisions you influenced.

blocks.title: Process
blocks.intro: Focus on evidence, decisions, testing, and refinement rather than listing every task.

blocks.title: Research
blocks.content: Explain what you needed to learn and what changed because of the findings.
blocks.show: notes, source data, site analysis, precedents, or user needs.

blocks.title: Outcome and impact
blocks.intro: Connect the finished work back to the original goals and support the result with evidence.

blocks.alt: Placeholder for the final project outcome
blocks.caption: Describe the final work and its most important feature.

blocks.content: State the result, its impact, the evidence of success, and any honest limitations.

blocks.title: What I learned
blocks.content: End with a specific lesson and the next improvement you would make.
